def negative_thread_local_storage_read_from_async_function():
    rule_id = "thread_local_storage_read_from_async_function"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Async function reads from threading.local() storage, which is per-thread not per-coroutine."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
